skills.name: geobase
skills.description: Start here for Geobase: private-beta Studio setup, project URL/anon key, secrets workflow, control-plane vs project scope, model registry, and routing to focused skills. Triggers on first-time Geobase use, geobase-cli (when shipped), project ref, endpoints, worker orchestration, beta access.

skills.name: geobase-embeddings
skills.description: GeoEmbeddings index — route embedding tasks by hierarchy: worker creation, catalogue metadata (RUD), application RPC, troubleshooting. Triggers on geoembeddings, embeddings table, similarity search entry point.

skills.name: geobase-embeddings-management
skills.description: GeoEmbeddings operations hierarchy overview: create via workers, catalogue RUD, RPC applications. Triggers when the user asks how GeoEmbeddings workflows fit together.

skills.name: geobase-embeddings-create-via-workers
skills.description: Create GeoEmbeddings tables only through worker jobs (never ad-hoc RPC). Triggers on create embeddings, new embeddings table, SRAI/GeoAI pipeline setup before tables exist.

skills.name: geobase-embeddings-catalogue-management
skills.description: Manage GeoEmbeddings catalogue metadata via PostgREST: list, visibility, delete, count on embeddings_catalogue. Triggers on catalogue, table metadata, RUD, visibility, embeddings_catalogue.

skills.name: geobase-embeddings-rpc-applications
skills.description: Application RPC: similarity_search and change_detection with correct geoembeddings schema, auth, overloads. Triggers on similarity search, nearest neighbor, change detection, embedding query from app code.

skills.name: geobase-embeddings-troubleshooting
skills.description: Diagnose GeoEmbeddings failures across worker jobs, catalogue API, and RPC. Triggers on embeddings error, job failed, RPC 4xx, empty similarity results, catalogue mismatch.

skills.name: geobase-worker-srai-embeddings
skills.description: Create and validate SRAI embeddings worker jobs (createSraiEmbeddings): pipeline payload, model registry, job polling. Triggers on SRAI, satellite imagery embeddings, remote sensing embeddings, createSraiEmbeddings.

skills.name: geobase-worker-geoai-embeddings
skills.description: Create and validate GeoAI embeddings worker jobs (createGeoEmbeddings): model selection, payload, job status. Triggers on GeoAI embeddings, createGeoEmbeddings, vision/geo model embeddings.

skills.name: geobase-worker-osm-import
skills.description: Create and validate OSM import worker jobs. Triggers on OpenStreetMap import, OSM extract, osm2pgsql-style load into project DB.

skills.name: geobase-tileserver
skills.description: Vector MVT tiles from PostGIS tables via /tileserver/v1 and MapLibre GL JS: tile URLs, source-layer, filters, styling gotchas. Triggers on vector tiles, MapLibre, MVT, choropleth, geometry table map layer.

skills.name: geobase-titiler
skills.description: Raster COG tiles via /titiler/v1: satellite, DEM, multispectral, colormap, rescale, MapLibre raster overlay. Triggers on COG, GeoTIFF, raster tiles, Titiler, remote sensing imagery on map.

skills.name: geobase-project-db-data-import
skills.description: Import local geospatial files (GeoParquet, GeoJSON, GPKG, Shapefile, CSV, Parquet) into project Postgres via ogr2ogr. Triggers on data import, load shapefile, geoparquet ingest, ogr2ogr.
